description_long: This rifle features a distinctive dual-barrel design, with two long cylindrical barrels running parallel and joined by a central connector. The main body and barrels are predominantly black, accented by blue highlights on the grip, barrel connectors, and select mechanical components. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a different material, likely polymer, for comfort and control. The trigger guard is robust and integrated into the lower receiver, while the top of the rifle includes a simple iron sight. The overall construction suggests a heavy, durable build, likely intended for specialized or high-impact use. The rifle's design is both functional and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A dual-barrel black rifle with blue accents, ergonomic grip, and robust construction. Features include a central connector, iron sight, and a visually striking, heavy-duty design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned side by side and the iron sight at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the dual barrels, blue connector, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dual barrels, blue connector, and grip from the other side.
